title: senna aurantia
intro: Senna aurantia, also known as yellow comfrey, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues due to its laxative effects. The plant's leaves and pods contain glycosides, which are responsible for its ability to stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. Senna aurantia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, or infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits, including promoting regular bowel movements and relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
